metadata.title: Pricing | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Simple, transparent Adon ERP pricing for startups, growing teams, and enterprise organizations.

hero.label: Adon ERP Pricing
hero.title: Choose the plan
hero.description: Start with the tools your team needs today, then scale into CRM, tasks, sales, accounting, inventory, ecommerce, automation, and reporting from one premium workspace.

cards.workflowDescription: Shared data keeps pricing, billing, approvals, and support aligned.

plansSection.title: Pricing that fits the way your team grows.
plansSection.description: Start lean, unlock automation when your workflow is ready, and move into enterprise support without rebuilding your stack.

plans.name: Launch
plans.description: A clean starting point for small businesses that need core CRM, sales, invoicing, and daily collaboration in one workspace.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Designed for teams that need more users, deeper visibility, and stronger day-to-day execution across sales and operations.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Built for ambitious teams that want automation, stronger reporting, and connected workflows without jumping to enterprise pricing.

plans.name: Professional
plans.description: For teams running multiple departments, heavier approvals, deeper reporting, and more operational complexity every day.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: A tailored Adon ERP environment for large teams, complex workflows, and dedicated support.

benefitsSection.title: Pricing that stays clear as your business grows.
benefitsSection.description: Adon ERP keeps your cost structure predictable while giving your team room to add modules, users, workflows, storage, reporting, and enterprise support.

benefits.title: Transparent billing
benefits.description: Clear pricing with no hidden implementation surprises for standard plans.

benefits.title: Secure workspace
benefits.description: Role-based access, activity visibility, and secure business data handling.

benefits.title: Scale module by module
benefits.description: Start with what you need today and expand as your business grows.

comparisonSection.title: Compare every plan clearly.
comparisonSection.description: Review users, storage, automation, integrations, branding, and support before choosing the right plan for your team.

addonsSection.title: Extend your workspace when needed.
addonsSection.description: Add extra capacity, expert implementation help, or advanced analytics without changing your whole plan.

addons.title: Extra Storage
addons.description: Add more secure storage for documents, images, reports, and operational records.

addons.title: Advanced Analytics
addons.description: Unlock deeper dashboards, custom exports, business intelligence, and performance tracking.

addons.title: Implementation Support
addons.description: Get expert help for migration, setup, onboarding, training, and workflow design.

faqs.q: Can I change my plan anytime?
faqs.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime. Plan changes can be applied based on your billing cycle and workspace requirements.

faqs.q: Do you offer a free trial?
faqs.a: Yes. The Professional plan can include a 14-day trial so your team can explore the workflow before committing.

faqs.q: Can I add only the modules I need?
faqs.a: Yes. Adon ERP is designed to scale module by module. You can start with CRM, tasks, sales, inventory, HR, ecommerce, or analytics depending on your business needs.
Yes. Enterprise customers can request custom workflows, reports, integrations, role permissions, and deployment options.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: Standard plans can support common online payment methods. Enterprise customers can use custom billing such as bank transfer or invoice-based payment.
Monthly plans do not require a long-term contract. Annual and enterprise agreements are also available for teams that need discounted or custom terms.

ctaSection.title: Ready to run your business smarter?
ctaSection.description: Start with the plan that fits today, then add more modules, automation, reporting, and support as your company grows.
